mapper.sql: select quota_id, user_id, quota_type, total_count, used_count, remaining_count, expire_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from biz_exchange_quota
mapper.insert: insert into biz_exchange_quota( user_id, quota_type, total_count, used_count, remaining_count, expire_time, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{quotaType}, #{totalCount}, #{usedCount}, #{remainingCount}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )

insert into biz_exchange_quota (user_id, quota_type, total_count, used_count, remaining_count, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{quotaType}, #{count}, 0, #{count}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update total_count = total_count + #{count}, remaining_count = remaining_count + #{count}, update_time = sysdate()
mapper.update: update biz_exchange_quota set used_count = used_count + #{count}, remaining_count = remaining_count - #{count}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and quota_type = #{quotaType}
